## Meeting Purpose

[Plan events and marketing activities for GrowthX for the rest of the year](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on high-end, exclusive events (dinners, breakfasts) to attract CMO/executive audience](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Prioritize U.S. events and speaking opportunities for Marcel and other leaders](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Balance between traditional conference presence and creative "disruptive" marketing tactics](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Leverage existing relationships and warm intros for speaking/sponsorship opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

## Topics

### Event Strategy and Formats

  - [Dinners: Prioritize venues allowing cocktail hour + sit-down dinner (e.g. Rosewood, Lamar)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Breakfasts: Easier to organize, good for networking, less expensive](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Large events: Good for awareness but less effective for deep conversations](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Sports events: Leverage existing Warriors tickets; consider booking Giants suites (\~$2,300 for 45-50 people)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)

### Upcoming AI Executive Dinner (June 25th)

  - [Decided on Lamar as venue despite higher cost (\~$200/head vs $150/head alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Benefits: Known venue, convenient parking, good food, consistent experience](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Action: Update landing page to feel more high-end/exclusive; use Luma for invitations](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Conference Strategy

  - [Focus on U.S. events for now](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Prioritize getting Marcel speaking slots (e.g. Content Marketing World, Webflow Conf)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Consider creative "disruptive" tactics for major events (e.g. branded vehicles, coffee stations)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
  - [Leverage team connections for warm intros to conference organizers](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

### Event Cadence and Planning

  - [Avoid scheduling multiple flagship events in same week](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Use conference dates as opportunities for side events (e.g. dinners)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Consider dividing team to cover multiple events in busy periods (e.g. September)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Move CMO breakfast to July 15th (Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Secure Lamar for June 25th AI Executive Dinner](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Update event landing page design to feel more premium/exclusive](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Research speaking opportunities for Marcel at upcoming conferences](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Explore creative marketing tactics for major events (e.g. Dreamforce)](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [During call with Dan (Upside), align on target audience profile for joint dinner](https://fathom.video/share/ixngskNwzwzmecogg-mFTg8ReFgaRErA?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
